meaning: Consumer Product Safety Commission (美国)消费品安全委员会
examples: Report every incident to the CPSC.
He also notified the manufacturer and the CPSC, which put out an official recall notice.
The following product safety recall was voluntarily conducted by the firm in cooperation with the CPSC.
The CPSC did these calculations because antimony is also used in fire retardants in mattresses.
The CPSC cited 166 deaths of children under 15 from those products since 1990.
